name: Spicy Mexican Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz.) black beans, drained and rinsed
1 can (15 oz.) red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
1 can (15 oz.) white beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onion in a saucepan with the water. Cook gently until the onion is soft and separated into rings, about 4 to 5 minutes.
2. Add the chili powder and stir until well mixed. Remove from heat.
3. Combine all of the ingredients in a large bowl and toss to mix well. Cover and chill for 1 to 2 hours to allow flavors to blend.
